title: The Prayer Walk
subtitle: A Guided Walk with God
introduction: This prayer walk follows the path under the palo verde trees and around the lawn at The Commons. There are six stations along the way, each with a Scripture and a prayer prompt. Walk slowly. There is no hurry. The walk ends at the entrance to The Prayer Space, where you’re invited to continue your time with God inside.
instructions: Begin at Station 1, just outside the northeast exit of The Commons. Follow the path around the lawn, stopping at each station. Spend 2–3 minutes at each station, or longer if the Spirit leads.

stations.title: Arrival
stations.subtitle: Becoming Present
stations.instruction: Before you begin walking, pause here. Take three slow, deep breaths. Release the hurry and noise of your day. You are stepping into sacred time. Ask God to meet you on this walk.
stations.scripture: Be still, and know that I am God.
stations.prompt: God, I’m here. Help me to be fully present with You on this walk.

stations.title: Creation
stations.subtitle: Seeing God’s Handiwork
stations.location: Halfway along the path, under the palo verdes
stations.instruction: As you walk, look around you. Notice the sky, the trees, the ground beneath your feet. Creation is God’s first sermon—His ongoing declaration that He is real, present, and generous.
stations.scripture: The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands.
stations.prompt: What do you notice in creation around you? Thank God for something specific you see.

stations.title: Confession
stations.subtitle: Honest Before God
stations.location: At the north point of the lawn
stations.instruction: Walking is an act of moving forward. As you walk this stretch, bring to God anything that weighs on your conscience. Confession isn’t about shame—it’s about honesty. God already knows. He’s inviting you to let it go.
stations.scripture: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins and purify us from all unrighteousness.
stations.prompt: Is there anything you need to confess or release? Speak it honestly to God.

stations.title: Intercession
stations.subtitle: Carrying Others to God
stations.location: Halfway along the path, heading back toward the Prayer Space
stations.instruction: Think of the people in your life—family, friends, coworkers, neighbors. Who needs prayer right now? As you walk, lift them by name to God. You don’t need eloquent words. Just bring them.
stations.scripture: Therefore I tell you, whatever you ask for in prayer, believe that you have received it, and it will be yours.
stations.prompt: Who is God placing on your heart? Pray for them by name as you walk.

stations.title: Listening
stations.subtitle: Hearing God’s Voice
stations.location: At the west corner of the grass
stations.instruction: Slow your pace. This station is about listening, not speaking. Ask God one simple question: “What do You want me to hear today?” Then walk in silence. Pay attention to what surfaces—a thought, a word, a feeling, a memory. God speaks in many ways.
stations.scripture: Whether you turn to the right or to the left, your ears will hear a voice behind you, saying, “This is the way; walk in it.”
stations.prompt: God, what do You want me to hear today? I’m listening.

stations.title: Entering the Space
stations.subtitle: From Walk to Rest
stations.location: At the entrance to The Prayer Space
stations.instruction: You’ve arrived at The Prayer Space. Before you enter, take a moment to thank God for meeting you on this walk. As you step inside, you’re moving from walking prayer into a room designed for stillness. The walls hold the prayers of others—and there’s space for yours too. Take your time.
stations.scripture: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
stations.prompt: Thank God for this walk. Step inside and continue your time with Him.
